hero.title: Powering the Future,
hero.description: SAIDI Canada delivers enterprise-grade data centre services powered by natural gas — the cleanest-burning fossil fuel — combined with Canada's natural cooling advantage. High performance, lower footprint.

about.label: About SAIDI Canada
about.title: Data Centre Excellence, Rooted in Canadian Values
about.p1: Canada is uniquely positioned to support the global data centre industry. With a naturally cool climate that dramatically reduces cooling costs, abundant natural gas resources, and some of the strongest environmental regulations in the world, our nation provides a responsible foundation for digital infrastructure.
about.p2: SAIDI Canada's facilities are powered primarily by liquefied natural gas (LNG) — the cleanest-burning fossil fuel, producing up to 50% less CO2 than coal and 30% less than oil. Combined with Canada's cold climate and our commitment to operational efficiency, we deliver data centre services with a significantly lower carbon footprint than the industry norm.

sustainability.label: Our Commitment
sustainability.title: A Cleaner Approach to Data Centre Energy
sustainability.description: The data centre industry accounts for roughly 1-1.5% of global electricity consumption, and that figure is rising. We're honest about the challenge: our facilities run on LNG, a fossil fuel. But it's the cleanest-burning one available, and when combined with Canada's natural cooling advantage and our efficiency-first engineering, it represents a meaningful step toward lower-carbon digital infrastructure — today, not someday.

lng.title: LNG: A Cleaner Bridge Fuel
lng.description: Natural gas produces up to 50% less CO2 than coal and 30% less than oil, with significantly lower particulate and sulphur emissions. While not zero-carbon, LNG is widely recognized as a critical transition fuel as the industry works toward renewable alternatives. We chose it deliberately as the cleanest option available at scale today.

cooling.title: Free-Air & Water Cooling
cooling.description: Canada's naturally cool climate allows us to use free-air cooling for much of the year, cutting energy consumption by up to 40% compared to traditional mechanical cooling. This is where our real environmental advantage lies — a benefit no amount of engineering can replicate in warmer climates.

efficiency.title: Efficiency-First Engineering
efficiency.description: We target a Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) of 1.2 or lower — well below the industry average of 1.58. Combined with LNG's lower emissions profile, this means every unit of computing we deliver has a smaller carbon footprint than most competitors worldwide.

banner.title: Canada's Climate Is Our Greatest Asset
banner.description: Our northern location isn't just scenic — it's our most powerful efficiency tool. Cold ambient temperatures slash cooling demands naturally, and when paired with LNG's lower emissions profile, the result is one of the lowest-carbon data centre operations achievable with today's proven technology.

pue.label: Target PUE
pue.description: Well below the industry average of 1.58

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Comprehensive Data Centre Services
services.description: From colocation to fully managed infrastructure, SAIDI Canada provides the full spectrum of data centre services — all delivered with our commitment to sustainability and operational excellence.

colocation.title: Colocation Services
colocation.description: Secure, climate-controlled rack space in our Tier III+ facilities. Bring your own hardware and benefit from our resilient power, cooling, and connectivity infrastructure. Flexible options from single racks to private cages and suites.

cloud.title: Cloud & Hybrid Solutions
cloud.description: Private cloud, public cloud, and hybrid architectures tailored to your workload. Our cloud infrastructure runs on energy-efficient hardware powered by LNG, delivering lower-carbon computing compared to coal or oil-dependent alternatives.

managed.title: Managed Hosting
managed.description: Fully managed dedicated servers and virtual environments. We handle provisioning, patching, monitoring, and maintenance so you can focus on your core business without worrying about infrastructure.

disaster.title: Disaster Recovery & Backup
disaster.description: Business continuity solutions with geographically diverse recovery sites across Canada. Automated backups, replication, and tested failover procedures ensure your data is always protected and recoverable.

network.title: Network & Connectivity
network.description: Carrier-neutral facilities with access to major Canadian and international network providers. High-bandwidth, low-latency connections with redundant fibre paths and direct peering with leading cloud platforms.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.description: Physical security with biometric access, 24/7 surveillance, and multi-layer perimeter controls. Compliance support for Canadian privacy regulations including PIPEDA, provincial health data requirements, and SOC 2.

managedServices.label: Full-Service Support
managedServices.title: Managed Services
managedServices.description: Let our team of certified engineers manage your infrastructure end-to-end. We offer proactive monitoring, rapid incident response, and strategic guidance — all backed by Canadian-based support staff available around the clock.
features: Backup management and disaster recovery testing

whySaidi.label: The SAIDI Difference
whySaidi.title: Why Choose SAIDI Canada
whySaidi.description: We combine world-class data centre operations with transparent environmental responsibility — delivering the reliability your business demands with a lower carbon footprint.

carbon.title: Lower Carbon
carbon.description: LNG power plus Canada's natural cooling means a significantly smaller carbon footprint than the industry average.

sovereignty.title: Canadian Data Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: Your data stays in Canada, protected by some of the world's strongest privacy laws.

power.title: Reliable Power
power.description: Redundant LNG-powered generation with full backup systems for consistent, dependable uptime.

support.title: Canadian Support
support.description: Bilingual, expert support teams based in Canada — available 24/7/365.

step1.title: Consult & Design
step1.description: We begin with a thorough assessment of your requirements — capacity, connectivity, compliance, and sustainability goals. Our team designs a solution tailored to your needs.

step2.title: Deploy & Connect
step2.description: Your infrastructure is provisioned in our secure, energy-efficient facilities. We handle everything from rack installation to network cross-connects, ensuring a seamless go-live.

step3.title: Manage & Scale
step3.description: With 24/7 monitoring and support, we keep your operations running at peak performance. As your needs grow, we scale your resources seamlessly — always sustainably.

cta.title: Ready for Lower-Carbon Digital Infrastructure?
cta.description: Join the growing number of Canadian businesses choosing cleaner data centre solutions. Let's discuss how SAIDI Canada can power your operations with a smaller footprint.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Whether you're looking for colocation, cloud solutions, or managed services, our team is ready to help you find the right sustainable infrastructure solution.
